data.title: Macy's opens new North Carolina fulfillment center, putting automation technology to work
data.description: The fulfillment center marks the third deployment of the technology for Macy's as it eyes further expansion.

data.title: Resale platform ThredUp sees secondhand gifts on the rise for holiday shoppers
data.description: Survey results in ThredUp's new holiday report show secondhand sales playing multiple roles for shoppers.

data.title: Grainger exits U.K. market to sharpen focus on digital commerce growth
data.description: The move effectively ends Grainger’s direct presence in Britain and reinforces its broader digital-first strategy — prioritizing scalable ecommerce platforms, data-driven supply chains, and high-margin online marketplaces in North America and Asia.

data.title: Basis Theory raises $33 million to build AI-driven payments for commerce
data.description: The company employs more than 40 people. It plans to expand its engineering, product and go-to-market teams in the coming year.

data.title: Americans split on AI and robotics but see manufacturing promise
data.description: Half of respondents (44%) expect robotics to bring more manufacturing back to American soil.
